message:
Running command: 
# Check the librelane version and how to resume from a specific step
librelane --help 2>/dev/null | head -30 || \
python3 -m librelane --help 2>/dev/null | head -30 || \
/nix/store/zkzv2pzi9yp00dmvlcvkdh2kxykicfqk-python3.13-librelane-3.0.2/bin/librelane --help 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "==="
# Check if there's a way to resume
which librelane 2>/dev/null || find /nix/store -name "librelane" -type f 2>/dev/null | grep "bin/librelane$" | head -3
